title: 【病毒攻破人類檢測防線！】追蹤1099名患者，43%的確診者沒有發燒！

replies.msg:

最新的資料顯示，係1000名確診患者中，43%係沒有發燒的。
即係話你中招，自己都未必知。
單純通過檢查體溫來進行檢疫的話，可能四成感染者係完全發現唔到的。

replies.msg:
Notably, fever occurred in only 43.8% of patients on initial presentation and developed in 87.9% following hospitalization. Absence of fever in 2019-nCoV ARD is more frequent than in SARS-CoV (1%) and MERS-CoV infection (2%) [19] and such patients may be missed if the surveillance case definition focused heavily on fever detection [14].
